countries/pakistan.summary: RECENT (Jun 12 2026): HRW report Jun 12 2026 on abusive forced evictions in Pakistan — Islamabad CDA completed first wave of demolitions of informal settlements: Muslim Colony (Bari Imam, in existence since 1960s) entirely leveled; Allama Iqbal Colony (1,000+ families) marked for razing. Spread continues into new geographic zones.

countries/israel.summary: ONGOING (Jun 7-16 2026): IDF operation in Balata camp, Nablus Jun 7. Military Police investigating killing of 7-month-old Palestinian infant in Hebron (soldier fired at car). IDF issued evacuation orders near Lebanon/Tyre Jun 8, striking Hezbollah. Iran halted attacks Jun 8 but threatened response if Lebanese operations continue. OCHA: 1,000+ settler attacks documented in 2026. Gaza humanitarian flash appeal launched for 3.6M people. Score floor at 20 set Jun 14.

countries/burkina-faso.summary: ONGOING LEAN SEASON (Jun-Aug 2026): Sahel lean season peak. 52.8M at acute food insecurity across West Africa/Sahel. Burkina: 2.1M IDP, part of 3.5M in besieged areas. Junta restricting humanitarian aid (arrests, red tape). Only 28% of required $215M funding secured. 8,000+ schools shuttered. JNIM attacks ongoing (Feb 2026 coordinated series across eastern/northern BFA). Score 6.3 set Jun 14. Lean season fully active — ongoing moderate evidence.

countries/mali.summary: ONGOING LEAN SEASON (Jun-Aug 2026): 415,000 IDP. 52.8M across Sahel at acute food insecurity. JNIM coordinated attacks (Feb 2026 series). 28% funding secured vs $215M needed. Lean season peak now active. Junta governance compounding humanitarian access.

countries/niger.summary: Touched by Sahel-countries batch; 283,000 IDP. Lean season Jun-Aug 2026 at peak. WFP severely underfunded. Part of 52.8M at acute food insecurity across Sahel. JNIM activity in border zones.

countries/cambodia.summary: Touched by batch-southeast-asia batch; no entity-specific compassion-relevant evidence surfaced in last 14 days.

countries/chad.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): Hosts Sudan/CAR refugee overflow. Lean season Jun-Aug peak. Sudanese cholera epidemic spreading into Chad — worst in years (Sudan: 124,269+ cases, 3,355 deaths). WFP severely underfunded. Sudan war displacement continuing to push into Chad. DRC cholera also elevated (39% case spike Jan 2026). Score 5.9 (critical) set Jun 14.

countries/venezuela.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): OHCHR Jun 2026: worsening human rights including enforced disappearances. 7M fled country; 14.2M with severe humanitarian needs. ICC investigating possible crimes against humanity with knowledge of high-ranking authorities. Persecution of opposition, journalists, human rights defenders ongoing. Post-Maduro transition contested. US deportations risk rights disaster (HRW Jan 2026).

countries/iran.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): Iran-US nuclear MOU near agreement but terms not finalised. Iran halted attacks on Israel Jun 8 amid ongoing Lebanon operations. Narges Mohammadi remains detained. Sanctions: US nuclear sanctions overlap with ongoing human rights/missile sanctions. Jan 2026 protest casualties. Score 2.5 (critical) set Jun 14. Moderate ongoing evidence — no new acute escalation.

countries/russia.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): Jun 14-15 massive Russian attack on Ukraine — 73 missiles + 600+ drones, killing 4-5 in Kyiv, damaging Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra cathedral. Jun law toughened "foreign agent" requirements. Russian Supreme Court Apr 9 declared Memorial "extremist." Journalists Kolezev (7.5 yrs), Masha Gessen (8 yrs), Mikhail Zygar (8.5 yrs) sentenced. Score floor at 2.5 set Jun 14. Ongoing major human rights crackdown + active war crimes.

countries/yemen.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): 72-hour UN-brokered truce May 25-27 collapsed — fighting resumed in Mareb and Hajjah. 370,000+ killed since 2014; 80% of population displaced. 40% of food imports face delays; malnutrition 58% (highest since 2019). Houthis used truce to smuggle in Iranian drones/missiles; Saudi coalition repositioned troops. No sustainable ceasefire.

countries/sudan.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): 33.7M people require humanitarian assistance (highest globally). 13-14M displaced since 2023. 21M+ at acute food insecurity. Sudanese cholera epidemic ongoing — worst in years. El Fasher: renewed 2026 fighting forced thousands more to flee into overcrowded camps. Jan 2026: 22,600+ newly displaced from Al Fasher. UNHCR: 4.5M+ fled to neighboring countries.

countries/somalia.summary: Touched by Horn-of-Africa batch; OCHA: deepening humanitarian crisis amid drought and flood risks. FGS Jubbaland offensive risk vs al-Shabaab. Al-Shabaab activity ongoing. Drought compounding displacement. WFP underfunded.

countries/afghanistan.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): 21.9M people require humanitarian assistance. 3.7M children under 5 at acute malnutrition risk; 942,000 with severe acute malnutrition. Access constraints: 66 incidents in Apr 2026 despite small decrease from Mar. Large-scale returns from Iran and Pakistan compounding pressure. Taliban enforced restrictions on women/girls in education and public life. OCHA: $1.7B needed to assist 17.5M; severely underfunded.

countries/north-korea.summary: ONGOING: 80,000-120,000 in political prison camps. Forced labour, inadequate food, harsh punishments. UN documented torture during interrogations. No independent monitors permitted. Defectors report public executions. Satellite imagery confirms recent camp renovation/expansion. Ongoing crimes against humanity — score stable at floor.

countries/myanmar.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): 5 years post-coup. 16.2M people require humanitarian assistance; 3.6M IDP. Military airstrikes hitting schools, hospitals, religious sites, displacement camps. Junta enforcing deadly blockades of humanitarian aid. Junta-sponsored elections Dec 2025-Jan 2026 embedded military dominance behind civilian façade. Ongoing IPC Phase 4-5 conditions in conflict-affected areas. Min Aung Hlaing now president. Economy contracted significantly.

countries/haiti.summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): 84,000+ arrested since 2022 under state of emergency suspending basic rights. Criminal gangs controlling large territories — killings, sexual violence, attacks on hospitals/schools. 200,000+ deported from US and Dominican Republic without due process (Amnesty 2024). US deportation surge in 2026 to volatile areas. Nearly 84,000 people arrested under emergency conditions.
